_comment: PLAN-111 severity staging. Bundle directory names whose hardcoded-user-text sweep is COMPLETE are enforced at ERROR (a violation fails the gate). Every other bundle is WARN (reported, non-failing) until its wave lands. `alternative-text` is always WARN regardless of this list until PLAN-113 clears it. Promote a bundle by adding its dir name here in the same commit that finishes its sweep.
